framework.name: Verifiability as Trust Proxy
framework.description: Tasks with high verifiability allow 'trustless' delegation (automated checking). Low-verifiability tasks require high-trust delegatees. This creates a natural constraint on delegation depth — you can only delegate deep on verifiable tasks.
framework.raw_quote: Tasks with high verifiability (e.g., formal code verification, mathematical proofs) allow for 'trustless' delegation or automated checking
